---
title: "Four Agents, No Ground Truth"
author: "Sangyu Xu"
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="coming-soon-page">
  <div class="coming-soon-inner">
    <span class="coming-soon-icon">🤖</span>
    <h1>Four Agents, No Ground Truth</h1>
    <p class="coming-soon-sub">Adversarial multi-agent LLM manuscript evaluation pipeline.</p>
    <p class="coming-soon-note">Notebook coming soon.</p>
  </div>
</div>
```
